message:
test(capability_override): add 45 edge-case tests for all 16 fields, guards, nesting, panic cleanup (bd-3ik3x)

- is_empty per-field: all 15 remaining fields individually verified
- apply_to: unicode_emoji, double_width, sync_output, osc8_hyperlinks, scroll_region, mouse_sgr
- Preset composition: dumb.apply_to(modern), modern.apply_to(dumb)
- tmux None fields passthrough
- Builder overwrite to None
- Guard drop after clear_all_overrides (documented noop)
- 3-level deep nesting (innermost wins, partial overrides)
- with_overrides_from method coverage
- Panic cleanup via catch_unwind
- Debug formatting sanity
- clear_all then push resumes
- current_capabilities integrates detect + overrides
- Return value propagation (String, tuple)
- Guard drop ordering (LIFO)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
